testcase.name: verifyHomepageElements
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of element located by By.xpath: //a[contains(@class, 'logo') or @id='mntl-header__logo_1-0'] | //*[name()='svg' and contains(@class,'icon-logo')] (tried for 30 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.21.0', revision: '79ed462ef4' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.12' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.198, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.155 (07b52360cc1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ACER\AppData\Local...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:60903}, goog:processID: 59584, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:60903/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.198, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 3652ee1bd4586d021a3663ea2f8f321b at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.HomePage.isLogoDisplayed(HomePage.java:53) at tests.HomeTest.verifyHomepageElements(HomeTest.java:16) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 27 stack frames

failure.message: FAIL: Search suggestions are not visible while typing. expected [true] but found [false]
